arts.ttl: PSG look to renew Désiré Doué’s contract following Manchester City interest
arts.sum: Désiré Doué (19) has committed his future to Paris Saint-Germain and that could soon take the form of a new contract, Sacha Tavolieri understands. Doué, after a difficult start following his move…

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: "We're aware of the difficulties of a match in Nantes"
arts.sum: Tomorrow will be a difficult match, but we are very motivated because we can become the first team in Europe's top five to go so many games away from home without losing. It's very important to manage workloads, especially in a team that plays so much.

Inconsistency has plagued Nantes' season and they welcome PSG on Tuesday with three wins and four losses from their last seven matches. The home side sit 14th heading into this one, three points clea...

arts.ttl: Nantes interested in bringing in former Lyon manager Pierre Sage
arts.sum: FC Nantes could make a managerial change at the end of the season. Les Canaris are not yet assured of safety and currently hover just three points above the relegation play-off spot…

arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man Utd’s €55M-Rated Target With PSG Clause Unlikely to Land at Barcelona
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain took a short-term approach last year, loaning Xavi Simons back to RB Leipzig. arts.ttl: Manchester United set for transfer battle with Manchester City for Ligue 1 winger 'wanted by Paris Saint-Germain'
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim may have to fend off competition from Manchester City and Paris Saint-Germain for a Ligue 1 winger.

arts.ttl: Liverpool, PSG Target Makes Huge Future Call Amid Chelsea and Real Madrid Transfer Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain were interested in Dean Huijsen last summer as part of their defensive rebuild, but the Spanish center-back chose a move to AFC Bournemouth instead. If PSG come calling again, they won’t be alone in the race.
